name: The Sentinel's Perch
description: A natural stone arch juts out from a high ridge, offering an unobstructed view of the rolling hills for leagues in every direction.

discovery.message: You notice a high, flat outcropping that would make an excellent vantage point.

perch-menu.text: From the top of the arch, the wind whips at your cloak and the land stretches out for miles. The stone is worn smooth by centuries of sentinels before you.

choices.label: Scout the horizon and chart the terrain.
Search the perch for forgotten gear.

scout-horizon.text: You spend an hour studying the ridges and valleys, fixing the path ahead in your mind.
scout-horizon.success_text: You carefully chart the ridges and valleys. Your knowledge of the path ahead will make the rest of this journey easier.
scout-horizon.failure_text: The shifting mists and repetitive hills make it difficult to get a clear sense of the geography.

scout-success.text: You commit the lay of the land to memory.

search-perch.text: You comb the crevices and weather-worn nooks of the arch.
search-perch.success_text: In a small crevice, you find a forgotten spyglass and a few dried rations.
search-perch.failure_text: You find nothing but bird nests and weathered stone.

search-loot.text: An old leather pouch sits wedged in the rock.

perch-leave.text: You climb back down from the perch.
